title: OpportunityFlowNode
description: Flow node representing a workflow status in the connected canvas. Includes optional friction chapter fields (avgDwellDays, emphasis).

isTerminal.description: Whether this status is a terminal exit state.

displayOrder.description: Deterministic sort order for left-to-right rendering.

colorGroup.description: Visual grouping for warm-to-cool color progression.

currentCount.description: Number of entities currently in this status.

inflowCount.description: Number of transitions into this status in the window.

outflowCount.description: Number of transitions out of this status in the window.

avgDwellDays.description: Average calendar days items currently spend in this status. Null if no entities in status. Used by the Friction chapter overlay.

emphasis.description: Server-computed emphasis hint for the Friction chapter. bottleneck=highest count concentration, blocked=highest avgDwellDays, active=rightmost non-zero non-terminal, normal=default.
